first_2_records.paper_title: Determination of volatile organic compounds pollution sources in malaysian drinking water using multivariate analysis

rows.benchmark_paper: Global assessment of chemical quality of drinking water: The case of trihalomethanes
rows.full_title: Determination of volatile organic compounds pollution sources in malaysian drinking water using multivariate analysis
rows.location_name: Multiple water treatment plants across 11 states and Federal Territory (Peninsular Malaysia)
rows.instrumentation: Solid phase micro-extraction (SPME) with 100 μm polydimethylsiloxane fibre; gas chromatography–mass spectrometry (GC–MS).
rows.sample_notes: 网页预览文本仅给出“各州的总THMs平均浓度范围”为28.4–33.0 μg/l；未提供各州/各采样点的具体数值、采样日期或样本量。采样点包括处理厂运行点、服务水库出口及管网辅助出口点。
rows.original_excerpt: Average concentrations of total trihalomethanes (THMs) were almost similar among all states which were in the range of 28.4--33.0 μg/l.
rows.page_or_table: Springer Nature Link HTML preview (no page numbers), main text

first_2_records.notes: 来源为Springer页面的订阅预览文本（未能访问全文/补充材料表格）。当前仅能提取到总THMs的州际平均浓度范围（28.4–33.0 μg/L）这一条聚合信息；无法可靠拆分到“具体州/城市/采样时间”。
